title: Creamy Bean Stew
description: A hearty, comforting stew made with earthy beans and a rich, creamy sauce.
instructions: Heat the buttery in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the beans and cook until they're tender, about 10 minutes.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Use an immersion blender to puree the stew until smooth.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
